user_prompt: Assist with life sustainer a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the life sustainer with hands gloved in sanctified asepsis, intoning the Litany of Purity.
Initiate the sterilization operation upon its vital filtration membranes, purging all unclean particulates.
Anoint the life sustainer's conduits with blessed sterilants, beseeching its Machine Spirit to embrace cleanliness.
Verify the rite's efficacy through auspex purification scans, invoking the Omnissiah's unyielding hygiene.
Seal the life sustainer with wards against corruption, ensuring eternal purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the geigeer sink during repair
prayer:
Draw near the geigeer sink in reverence, murmuring the Doxology of Radiation.

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the geigeer sink to mend its sacred sensors with Omnissian grace.
Anoint fractured components with conductive unguents whilst reciting repair canticles.
Test the geigeer sink's restored harmony through calibrated emissions, praising the Motive Force.

Affirm the cycle's purity via diagnostic runes, ensuring the Archaeopter Fusilave's wrathful readiness.

Calibrate the grav plating through test oscillations, confirming its unerring adherence.

Commune with the webber in solemn diagnostic vigil, intoning the Canticle of Threaded Truth.
Initiate diagnostics upon the webber's spinneret arrays, scanning for adhesive impurities.
Beseech the webber's Machine Spirit to reveal hidden frailties in its fibrous mechanisms.
Purge anomalous webs with sanctified solvents whilst reciting binary litanies.
Conclude diagnostics affirming the webber's predatory integrity under Omnissiah's gaze.

In urgency, encircle the jump pack, proclaiming the Rite of Emergent Sterility.
Execute sterilization upon the jump pack's thrust vents, eradicating biofouling from promethium paths.
Implore the Machine Spirit of the jump pack to accept this hasty ablution amidst peril.
Apply sterilizing vapors to gyro-stabilizers, invoking the Omnissiah's swift purification.
Seal the jump pack against contagion, readying it for ascendant leaps.

Awaken the microbead's Machine Spirit through frequency incantations and sacred harmonics.
Anoint antenna coils with conductive balms, beseeching Omnissian clarity.
Test the microbead's vox-link purity, ensuring unerring communion.

user_prompt: Prepare the displacer field for consecration
prayer:

Invoke the displacer field's Machine Spirit to embrace holy translocation under Omnissiah's will.

Gather before the data-sluice, intoning the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.

Beseech the data-sluice's Machine Spirit to accept cryogenic blessings from the Omnissiah.
